## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Validation
- [ ] `tests/repo_tools/ci-lint.sh`
- [ ] `tests/repo_tools/smoke-workflow.sh` (or N/A: no runtime change)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `README.en.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`) if behavior changed

## Security and Supply Chain
- [ ] No secrets/tokens added
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed (or none)
- [ ] Security impact assessed

## Release Notes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (or N/A)
- [ ] Manifest versions/release refs updated (release PR only)
